THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GARZA, ARMAND BREEDING, JOHN THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 516 O'FARRELL ST. #307, S.F., LEASE FORFEITED, EVICTION STAYED TILL 10AM 9/1/97. NO ONE ELSE HAS RIGHT TO CLAIM POSSESSION. MUTUAL WAIVER OF ALL CLAIMS. EACH PARTY TO BEAR OWN COSTS AND ATTY FEES.
